allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('./node_modules/@iconify-json/heroicons/icons.json'\); Object.keys\(icons.icons\).filter\(k => k.includes\('arrow'\) || k.includes\('chevron'\)\).forEach\(k => console.log\(k\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./node_modules/@iconify-json/heroicons/icons.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(d.icons\).filter\(k => k.includes\('arrow'\) || k.includes\('chevron'\)\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\)")
